metadata.description: Tiangong AI skill collections for news and journal pipelines, public-opinion intelligence, environmental monitoring, knowledge-base workflows, email automation, file utilities, and engineering analysis

plugins.name: news-and-journal-pipelines
plugins.description: News, RSS, and journal ingestion pipelines for fetching metadata, enriching full text, and generating grounded summaries.

plugins.name: public-opinion-and-media-intelligence
plugins.description: Public-opinion, social-media, policy-comment, and news-intelligence skills across GDELT, Regulations.gov, YouTube, and Bluesky.

plugins.name: environment-and-geospatial-monitoring
plugins.description: Environmental and geospatial monitoring skills for weather, air quality, floods, fires, and observational datasets.

plugins.name: knowledge-base-and-research-ops
plugins.description: Knowledge-base, literature, document parsing, and research workflow skills for ingestion, retrieval, metadata backfill, and notebook operations.

plugins.name: email-and-mailbox-automation
plugins.description: Mailbox monitoring, message retrieval, draft staging, and outbound email delivery skills built around IMAP and SMTP workflows.

plugins.name: file-and-image-utilities
plugins.description: Utility skills for local file workflows, NAS file operations, image conversion, and image deduplication or cleanup.

plugins.name: engineering-analysis
plugins.description: Engineering and repository analysis skills for contribution evaluation and evidence-based reporting.
